case_title: HOMERO VALDESPINO VS. JHON E. HORTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,853.93 FILED BY VALDESPINO, HOMERO AS TO DEFENDANT HORTON, JHON E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF VALDESPINO, HOMERO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HORTON, JHON E.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JHON HORTON E. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 AT 10:00AM AS IMPROPERLY NAMED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDESPINO, HOMERO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO ADD SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA AS A DEFENDANT. SAN FRANCISCO TOYOTA APPEARED AT TRIAL, AND WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT JHON HORTON E. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF VALDESPINO, HOMERO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
